kubectl get servicetemplates -A

versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: cloudcasa
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: cloudcasa-3-4-6
      name: cloudcasa
      namespace: cloudcasa-io
